title: Password Reset Guide
text: To reset your account password, open the settings page, choose security, and click reset password. A verification email will be sent to your registered address.

title: Refund Policy
text: Customers can request a refund within 30 days of purchase if the product is defective or if the wrong item was shipped.

title: Phishing Email Warning
text: Employees should never click suspicious links or download attachments from unknown senders. Report phishing emails immediately to the security team.

title: Vacation Policy
text: Full-time employees receive 20 days of annual leave. Vacation requests should be submitted at least two weeks in advance.

title: Invoice Payment Support
text: If an invoice payment fails, verify the billing address, card details, and card expiry date. If the problem continues, contact billing support.

title: Remote Work Device Rules
text: Only company-managed laptops with disk encryption and updated antivirus software may access internal systems from remote locations.
